metadata.description: Otto Lite — free starter pack of 10 real estate AI skills for licensed agents.

plugins.name: otto-lite
plugins.description: A free starter pack of 10 real estate AI skills: Humanizer, Market Researcher, Objection Handler, Crucial Conversations, Email Writer, Executive Assistant, Listing Assistant, New Listing Launch, Weekly Listing Update, and Weekly Priorities. The free starter to the full Otto plugin.
